proven.claim: PROVEN: isHook = false when the header console.log fires at line 242.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 242
; PROVEN: isHook = false when the header console.log fires at line 242.
; The if(isHook) branch calls process.exit(0) or process.exit(1) on every
; sub-path — it never falls through to line 242.
(declare-const isHook Int)         ; 0 = false, 1 = args.includes("--hook")
(declare-const exit_in_hook Int)   ; 1 = process.exit was called inside hook branch
; Code transition: hook branch has two process.exit() calls covering all sub-paths
(assert (=> (= isHook 1) (= exit_in_hook 1)))
; Code transition: process.exit terminates execution — line 242 is only reachable
; when exit_in_hook = 0
(assert (= exit_in_hook 0))
; Negation of proven property: can isHook = 1 while line 242 is still reached?
(assert (= isHook 1))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: REACHABLE: runVerifyOnly is called with a projectRoot that has no .neurallog/contracts.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 242
; REACHABLE: runVerifyOnly is called with a projectRoot that has no .neurallog/contracts.
; resolveProjectRoot returns user-supplied path directly (resolve(args[0])) without
; checking for .neurallog/contracts. ContractStore.loadFromDisk returns early when
; the directory does not exist (src/contracts.ts: if (!existsSync(this.contractsDir)) return).
(declare-const explicit_path_given Int)   ; 1 = user passed a positional path arg
(declare-const has_neurallog_dir Int)     ; 1 = .neurallog/contracts exists at path
(declare-const contracts_loaded Int)      ; contracts loaded by ContractStore
; Code transition: resolveProjectRoot returns resolve(args[0]) when given explicit path
(assert (= explicit_path_given 1))
; Code transition: resolveProjectRoot does NOT call existsSync(".neurallog") —
; no project structure validation is performed
(assert (= has_neurallog_dir 0))
; Code transition: ContractStore.loadFromDisk: if (!existsSync(contractsDir)) return
; → 0 contracts loaded when directory is absent
(assert (=> (= has_neurallog_dir 0) (= contracts_loaded 0)))
; Violation: runVerifyOnly executes against a non-project directory, produces empty report
(assert (= contracts_loaded 0))
(check-sat)
